description.value: Aura faint divination; CL 3rd; Slot none; Price 2,500 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This amulet is a small crystal at the end of a simple leather thong. It glows brightly from within, shedding light equivalent to that of a torch. This item is associated with a particular group. Once per day, the amulet’s bearer can clutch the object and call for help. Doing so immediately contacts the three closest representatives of the associated group and gives them intimate knowledge of the pendant’s location, as per the locate object spell, out to a distance of a mile. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, light, locate object; Cost 1,250 gp
